rows.label: qev025705_MSG0001
rows.name:
Go ask my friends somewhere in this
city for their three sizes, alright![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025705_MSG0002
rows.name:
The junior representative is Beberta! The
misses representative is Aalis! And the madam
representative is Biiponne... you know![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025705_MSG0003
rows.name:
So, how was it? Did you ask
them for their three sizes?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025705_MSG0004
rows.name:
...Okay! Then next, go get
that Smooth Leather, okay![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025705_MSG0005
rows.name:
All okay? Then hand over the Smooth
Leather and the data to Victoria![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025705_MSG0006
rows.name:
The scent I like is... let's see... The smell
of something like Waldo Cherries or Sona Herbs
would totally melt my heart, you know![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025705_MSG0007
rows.name:
Hey! Looks like you've got
something nice on you, don't You?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025705_MSG0008
rows.name:
Which of those perfume ingredients do
You think would make the best one?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025705_MSG0009
rows.name:
*Sniff, sniff*... Ooh! This is
a wonderful scent, absolutely
perfectly good, isn't it![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025705_MSG0010
rows.name: Let me take a sniff too...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025705_MSG0011
rows.name:
...I see, this is a very
wild scent, isn't it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025705_MSG0012
rows.name:
It feels like something a wild
girl like Panyal would prefer.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025705_MSG0013
rows.name:
...Yes, I think it's very nice
too. Tell me, do you think you
could like this kind of wild scent?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025705_JNK0010
rows.name: Affirm

rows.label: qev025705_SEL0011
rows.name: Nod and say that wild scents make your heart race.

rows.label: qev025705_JNK0020
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev025705_SEL0021
rows.name: Say you prefer a more relaxing scent.

rows.label: qev025705_MSG0014
rows.name:
Hehe, I'm glad. I figured
this kind of scent would be
a hit with BLADEs like you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025705_MSG0015
rows.name:
I suppose that for BLADEs like you
who spend every day fighting, a
calming scent is better, is it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025705_MSG0016
rows.name:
...But I think there's demand for this in
its own right. There must be people who are
constantly seeking stimulation, after all.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025705_MSG0017
rows.name:
I'll start on product development right away.
Here, this is your reward for helping out.
Thank you for taking on all my requests.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025705_MSG0018
rows.name:
*Sniff, sniff*... Ooh! This is
a wonderful scent, absolutely
perfectly good, isn't it![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025705_MSG0019
rows.name: Let me take a sniff too...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025705_MSG0020
rows.name:
...I see, this is a very
soothing, sweet scent, isn't
it. I think it's fantastic.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025705_MSG0021
rows.name:
...But it's a little surprising. Given
Panyal's personality, I thought she would
prefer something with a bit more edge.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025705_MSG0022
rows.name:
I'm actually a pretty delicate maiden, You know!
Here, why don't You take a sniff too? What do you
think? It's a sweet, wonderful scent, isn't it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025705_JNK0030
rows.name: Affirm

rows.label: qev025705_SEL0031
rows.name: Nod and say the sweet scent feels like it could melt your heart.

rows.label: qev025705_JNK0050
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev025705_SEL0051
rows.name: Say you prefer a wilder scent.

rows.label: qev025705_MSG0023
rows.name:
Hehe, maybe this could become a
little healing item for BLADEs
who fight day in and day out?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025705_MSG0024
rows.name:
I suppose BLADEs really do prefer
something with a more wild feel, do they?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025705_MSG0025
rows.name:
...But I think there's demand for this in
its own right. There must be people who
want to soothe their hearts, after all.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025705_MSG0026
rows.name:
I'll start on product development right away.
Here, this is your reward for helping out.
Thank you for taking on all my requests.[ST:wait ]
